title: Bootstrap CLI
description: Create the initial holon CLI for intent creation. The CLI tool should be called `holon` and not `holon-cli`. The CLI tool will be executed in an isolated sandboxed environment (i.e. docker). The isolated environment should be able to clone its own copy of the project and checkout the correct branch for the action it is taking. You can read through the docs for more information.
goal: Give the system the ability to spawn its own future tasks
